summary: Complete testing of Vegsoft Solutions landing page - all major features working correctly with excellent backend/frontend integration

design_issues.issue: Success toast message not visually appearing after contact form submission (though backend integration works perfectly)

passed_tests: Contact form submission to /api/contact - Status 200 with valid response
Appointment creation to /api/appointments - Status 200 with UUID
Form validation for invalid data - Status 422 as expected
Hero section loads with correct Spanish title 'Transformamos tu negocio con Software e IA'
Language selector switches between ES/EN with flags successfully
Navigation scroll to sections (Services, Clients, Process, Contact) works
Services section displays 6 service cards as expected
Contact form fills and submits with backend integration
Calendar modal opens from CTA buttons and flows through 3 steps
Calendar date selection and time slots selection works
WhatsApp floating button present and functional
Mobile responsive design - header menu toggle works perfectly
API requests properly routed to backend with /api prefix

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major UI components working, minor toast notification visibility issue
